passages.passage_text: Directions: In each of the following questions, a statement or two statements are followed by two conclusions. Give answer (a) if conclusion I follows; (b) if conclusion II follows; (c) if both I and II follow; (d) if either I or II follows; (e) if neither I nor II follows.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Statement: Ten persons who were on the waiting list could finally get berth reservation in the Frontier Mail. Conclusions: I. Wait-listed passengers generally find it difficult to get berth reservation in the Frontier Mail. II. The number of berths available in the Frontier Mail is less.

choices.c: if both I and II follow
choices.d: if either I or II follows
choices.e: if neither I nor II follows
